Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad
Gamepad input support for FlixelGDX.

FlixelGamepadModel describes the detected controller family (for UI prompts and telemetry). Logical buttons and axes are defined on FlixelGamepadInput and resolved per device through gdx-controllers Controller.getMapping(). The global Flixel.gamepads manager is wired from FlixelGame each frame.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input
    Input event handling and device abstraction for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action
    Logical input actions: named FlixelAction instances grouped in a FlixelActionSet, with tagged FlixelInputBinding and FlixelAnalogAxisBinding so keyboard, gamepad, pointer, and touch regions never share one ambiguous integer bucket.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard
    Keyboard input support for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.mouse
     
  • Class
    Description
    FlixelGamepadDetector
    Maps a controller name string (for example from Controller.getName()) to a FlixelGamepadModel.
    FlixelGamepadDevice
    Optional per-slot facade for gamepad queries.
    FlixelGamepadInput
    Logical gamepad button and axis identifiers for FlixelGamepadManager, resolved to native indices through each Controller.getMapping() (gdx-controllers SDL-style layout).
    FlixelGamepadManager
    Global gamepad manager backed by gdx-controllers.
    FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadConnectedEvent
    Mutable payload reused for FlixelGamepadManager.deviceConnected; do not retain past the callback.
    FlixelGamepadManager.GamepadDisconnectedEvent
    Mutable payload reused for FlixelGamepadManager.deviceDisconnected; do not retain past the callback.
    FlixelGamepadModel
    High-level controller family used for UI prompts (for example "press A" vs "press X") and telemetry.
